title: OUTDOOR SCHOOL - 211info
text: MULTNOMAH EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT OUTDOOR SCHOOL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates outdoor school and other environmental education services. Sends 6th-grade students to outdoor school and involves high school students as student leaders. 11611 NE Ainsworth Circle Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Students in grades K-12 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 257-1600 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 257-1600 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: $0-$100, depending on the school district DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Outdoor Environmental Education Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - MIGRANT EDUCATION PROGRAM EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - ALTERNATIVE PATHWAYS/TRIO EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME SCHOOLING EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - SPECIAL EDUCATION SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MULTNOMAH EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT
